message:
refactor(client,ssh): extract SSH proxy/TLS helpers with tests, add sessioninner I/O test coverage

Extract build_ssh_proxy_command, build_tls_creds_command, and
should_retry_tls_bootstrap_after_reuse_error from Reconnectable as
testable static methods. Add 8 unit tests covering proxy command
construction, TLS credentials formatting, and retry-after-reuse
error classification.

Add 7 tests for sessioninner write_from_buf and read_into_buf
with mock I/O types (PartialWriter, WouldBlockWriter, ErrorWriter,
WouldBlockReader, ErrorReader, PanicOnRead) covering partial writes
that drain correctly, WouldBlock preserving buffer state, non-WouldBlock
error propagation, EOF detection, and backpressure behavior at
MAX_DESCRIPTOR_BUF_SIZE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
